title: Large autumn christmas door wreath - 38cm artificial wreath - christmas door decoration - autumn orange foliage - door wreath with pumpkin berries and pine cones.
features: AUTUMN WREATH - Bring the warmth and beauty of fall into your home with this large 38cm Autumn Wreath, featuring a harmonious blend of orange and brown tones complemented by lifelike autumnal foliage. Perfect for adorning doors, walls, or mantels, this wreath captures the essence of the season, evoking the charm of crisp autumn days and colorful leaves.

SEASONAL AESTHETICS - The wreath showcases a rich palette of orange, brown, and earthy tones, reflecting the natural beauty of fall. Embellished with realistic autumnal foliage such as maple leaves, berry clusters, and other seasonal accents, it creates a warm and inviting look. Perfect for enhancing your homes fall decor or setting the stage for Thanksgiving celebrations.

LARGE AND VERSATILE - At 38cm in diameter, this wreath is an ideal size for medium to larger spaces, offering a statement piece to any area. Lightweight and easy to hang, it works beautifully on front doors, interior walls, windows, or as part of a table centerpiece.

LOW MAINTENANCE - Unlike fresh wreaths, this artificial design requires no watering, pruning, or special care. Simply dust off when needed and store safely to reuse year after year, offering excellent value for money. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor display, the wreath is crafted to withstand typical autumn weather when used on a covered porch or door.
